ingredients_text: CARBONATED WATER, CITRIC ACID, ERYTHRITOL, TAURINE, SODIUM CITRATE, NATURAL & ARTIFICIAL FLAVORS, PANAX GINSENG FLAVOR, L-CARNITINE L-TARTRATE, CAFFEINE, SUCRALOSE, SORBIC ACID (PRESERVATIVE), BENZOIC ACID (PRESERVATIVE), NIACINAMIDE (VIT. B3), D-CALCIUM POTASSIUM (VIT. B5), PYRIDOXINE HYDROCHLORIDE (VIT. B6), CYANOCOBALMIN (VIT. B12).
